StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(mi.info) AS movie_budget, MIN(mi_idx.info) AS movie_votes, MIN(t.title) AS movie_title FROM job.cast_info AS ci, job.info_type AS it1, job.info_type AS it2, job.movie_info AS mi, job.movie_info_idx AS mi_idx, job.name AS n, job.title AS t WHERE ci.note IN ('(producer)', '(executive producer)') AND it1.info = 'budget' AND it2.info = 'votes' AND n.gender = 'm' AND n.name LIKE '%Tim%' AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mi_idx.movie_id AND t.id = ci.movie_id AND ci.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND ci.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND mi.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND n.id = ci.person_id AND it1.id = mi.info_type_id AND it2.id = mi_idx.info_type_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: ([dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(executive producer)' OR [dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(producer)') AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1757],[dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[person_id] as [ci].[person_id])
